meanings.definition: a blow from a flat object (as an open hand)
the taste experience when a savoury condiment is taken into the mouth
a sailing ship (usually rigged like a sloop or cutter) used in fishing and sailing along the coast
the act of smacking something; a blow delivered with an open hand

examples: The teacher smacked the student who had misbehaved

meanings.definition: have a distinctive or characteristic taste
press (the lips) together and open (the lips) noisily, as in eating

examples: he ran bang into the pole
